name: Pyraxis's Fall
description: The embercrawlers were only the spillover. Their source coils in the molten heart of the Emberdeep: Pyraxis, the Ember Wyrm, whose furnace-breath keeps the fissure boiling and the militia's scouts driven back. Warden Kessa can hold the mouth no longer alone. Descend to the forge-heart, face the wyrm in its lair, and end it — only then will the Emberdeep cool.
